parameters.body:
=JSON.stringify({
  diff: '=== PostgreSQL Backup Logs ===\n' + $json.pg_logs +
        '\n\n=== MariaDB Backup Logs ===\n' + $json.mariadb_logs +
        '\n\n=== rclone Sync Logs ===\n' + $json.rclone_logs +
        ($json.restore_verify_logs ? '\n\n=== Weekly Restore Verification Logs ===\n' + $json.restore_verify_logs : ''),
  depth: 'quick',
  pr_number: 0,
  commit_sha: '',
  repo_url: '',
  branch: '',
  prompt_type: 'backup-digest'
})

parameters.workflowInputs: =JSON.stringify({ message: $json.review_text || $json.error || '⚠️ Backup digest generation failed — check manually', webhook_url: 'http://192.168.50.11:8644/webhooks/n8n-complete' })
